description: A YELLOW Tier 2 (warnings only, no blocking failure) does NOT block the behavioral tier. With Tier 1 PASS and Tier 3 GREEN, the YELLOW static gate still permits VERIFIED. Proves YELLOW is treated as passing for promotion (§ 5 R2 only RED blocks Tier 3).
why: § 6 R6: t2 ∈ {GREEN,YELLOW} satisfies the VERIFIED predicate; YELLOW does not block (§ 5 R2). Row (PASS, GREEN|YELLOW, GREEN) -> VERIFIED.
